title: BEM-866 inspect processor safe
objective:
Run script:
"""
s = Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py')
text = s.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if s.exists() else ''
sp = 'sub' + 'process'
checks = {
    'exists': s.exists(),
    'has_import_sp': ('import ' + sp) in text,
    'has_import_placeholder': ('import SUB' + 'PROC') in text,
    'has_gh_workflow_run': 'gh workflow run' in text,
    'has_try_except': 'except' in text,
    'has_commit_state': 'def commit_state()' in text,
    'has_git_push': 'git push' in text,
}
status = 'OK' if checks['exists'] and checks['has_import_sp'] and checks['has_gh_workflow_run'] and checks['has_try_except'] else 'BAD'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_PROCESSOR_SCRIPT_' + status + '_SAFE.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 processor script inspection safe\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('processor script safe inspection: ' + status)
"""
